title: Golden Globes Winners List 2026 - IndieWire
text: Best Performance by a Female Actor in a Television Series – Drama. Winner: Rhea Seehorn ("Pluribus"). The nominees for this category were Kathy Bates ("Matlock"), Britt Lower ("Severance"), Helen Mirren ("Mobland"), Bella Ramsey ("The Last of Us"), Keri Russell ("The Diplomat"), and Rhea Seehorn ("Pluribus") - WINNER. Seehorn's victory in this dramatic television category represents a notable win during the 2026 Golden Globes ceremony held on January 11.
